onboarding_screening.style: PAR-Q+ based pre-participation gate, shown once at camp onboarding
onboarding_screening.on_yes_answer: Recommend medical guidance before training; default the user toward Easy. Never hard-block silently.
questions: Has a doctor ever said you have a heart condition or high blood pressure?
Do you feel pain in your chest at rest or during physical activity?
Do you lose balance because of dizziness, or have you lost consciousness in the last 12 months?
Do you have a bone, joint, or soft-tissue problem that could be made worse by becoming more physically active?
Are you currently taking prescribed medication for a chronic medical condition?
Has your doctor ever said you should only do medically supervised physical activity?

danger_question.label: Any dizziness, chest symptoms, sharp pain, concussion symptoms, or new injury?
danger_question.on_yes: Halt the session. Clearly advise stopping exercise. No progression penalty.

daily_readiness.low_readiness_response: Offer the Easy variant or a recovery session instead. Completing it keeps the streak.

between_split_sessions.shown: Before the PM mission on split days
questions: Do you feel unusually heavy or slow?
Did you complete the morning session within the assigned effort?
Do you have sharp pain or a new injury?
between_split_sessions.on_bad_answers: Suggest moving the PM mission to tomorrow or an Easy variant. Never shame.

hard_rules: Never reward or require dehydration or rapid weight cutting
Danger symptoms always halt the session with a clear stop-exercise advisory
